suppress.notes: False positive: opal-maintenance-service does not resolve nu.validator:validator on runtime, test, or functional classpaths. Dependency-check appears to match this CVE against unrelated '*validator*' artifacts.

False positive: opal-maintenance-service does not resolve nu.validator:validator on runtime, test, or functional classpaths. Dependency-check appears to match this CVE against unrelated '*validator*' artifacts.

False positive: CVE-2025-7962 is an SMTP injection issue in Jakarta Mail. opal-maintenance-service only resolves org.eclipse.angus:angus-activation transitively from JAXB/Hibernate, and does not resolve Angus Mail / SMTP providers on runtime, test, or functional classpaths.
